referral_code.description: The referrer's code that was used

referrer_email.description: Email of the parent who referred this family

referred_name.description: Name of the referred parent or child

registration_id.description: ID of the Registration created via this referral

status.description: pending = just registered, converted = enrolled, rewarded = referrer has been given their reward

reward_note.description: Note about what reward was given, e.g. a promo code
